// GEÇİCİ — TS port'u için ground-truth üretir. Video botu doğrulaması sonrası silinir.
import 'dart:convert';
import 'dart:math';
import 'package:flutter_test/flutter_test.dart';
import 'package:conveyor_sort/game/level_config.dart';
import 'package:conveyor_sort/game/services/daily_challenge_service.dart';
import 'package:conveyor_sort/game/sequence_validator.dart';

void main() {
  test('dump parity ground truth', () {
    final out = <String, dynamic>{};

    // 1) Dart Random primitive probe — nextInt dizisi
    final r1 = Random(12345);
    out['rand_12345_nextInt1000'] =
        List.generate(20, (_) => r1.nextInt(1000));
    final r2 = Random(1);
    out['rand_1_nextInt2'] = List.generate(20, (_) => r2.nextInt(2));

    // 2) List.shuffle primitive probe
    final l1 = List<int>.generate(10, (i) => i)..shuffle(Random(999));
    out['shuffle_0to9_seed999'] = l1;
    final l2 = List<int>.generate(24, (i) => i % 4)..shuffle(Random(20260718));
    out['shuffle_24mod4_seedDaily'] = l2;

    // 3) Gerçek dizilimler
    Map<String, dynamic> dump(LevelConfig c, int? seed, String label) {
      final seq = c.buildSpawnSequence(seed: seed);
      final sim = simulateSequence(sequence: seq, dockSlots: c.dockSlots);
      return {
        'label': label,
        'seed': seed ?? c.level * 7919,
        'colorCount': c.colorCount,
        'targetItems': c.targetItems,
        'windowTriplets': c.windowTriplets,
        'effectiveWindowTriplets': c.effectiveWindowTriplets,
        'maxRun': c.maxRun,
        'dockSlots': c.dockSlots,
        'crossTime': c.crossTime,
        'spawnInterval': c.spawnInterval,
        'sequence': seq,
        'sim_lost': sim.lost,
        'sim_stranded': sim.strandedInDock,
      };
    }

    out['daily_20260718'] =
        dump(DailyChallengeService.dailyConfig, 20260718, 'daily');
    out['daily_20260719'] =
        dump(DailyChallengeService.dailyConfig, 20260719, 'daily+1');
    for (final lvl in [1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 15, 42]) {
      out['level_$lvl'] = dump(LevelConfig.forLevel(lvl), null, 'L$lvl');
    }

    // Makine-okunur satır (flutter test log'undan çekmek için tek satır)
    print('PARITY_JSON_BEGIN');
    print(jsonEncode(out));
    print('PARITY_JSON_END');
  });
}
